title: Penalties
description: Penalties we impose and how we calculate it using a statutory formula or in multiples of a 'penalty unit'.
keywords: penalties, penalty units, ftl penalty, failure to lodge, false or misleading statement, penalty, penalties, penalty relief, fine

child_links.title: Penalty units
child_links.description: How we calculate penalties, and the penalty unit amounts for the period the infringement occurred.

child_links.title: Penalties for making false or misleading statements
child_links.description: Penalties may apply for making false or misleading statements or taking a position that is not reasonably arguable.

child_links.title: Penalty relief
child_links.description: How penalty relief applies to inadvertent errors in tax returns and activity statements.

child_links.title: Failure to meet other tax obligations
child_links.description: You are liable to incur penalties if you fail to meet the obligations contained in the various tax laws.

child_links.title: Failure to lodge on time penalty
child_links.description: Penalties we apply if you fail to meet your tax lodgment obligations on time.

child_links.title: Failure to withhold
child_links.description: Businesses are liable for a penalty for failing to withhold or pay a PAYG withholding amount when required.
